sections.paragraph:
ἔγκατα, άτων, τά (Hom.+; Theocr. 22, 202; Pollux 6, 51; schol. on Nicander, Ther. 694; TestSol 18:13 A) inmost parts 1 Cl 18:10 (Ps 50:12). Addition to Papias 3:2 (s. Preuschen, Antilegomena p. 98).—DELG (etym. uncertain).

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

Theocr Theocr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

Pollux Pollux , II a.d.—List 5

schol. schol. = scholion, scholia, scholiast

Nicander Nicander , III/II b.c.—List 5

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

Papias Papias , early Christian writer, II a.d.—List 1

Preuschen, Preuschen, Antilegomena = EP., Antilegomena; s. Antilegomena in List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

etym. etym. = etymology, -ical

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 273
